calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-27-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Trinity Capital Corporation.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants: K.W.D.S.D., Inc. dba Tires Plus and Kelvin Stewart.
Principal of $32,833.01
Interest $1,708.57
Attorney's fees of $2,500.00
Costs of $362.50
For the total of $37,404.08
Plaintiff is the owner, and is entitled to the immediate possession of the leased equipments listed in the Judgment. See scanned doc for details.
Judgment signed in open court.
